E-ACTIVITY-LEDGER.negative_finding: The append-only activity ledger is absent.

E-AGENT-AIM-FAILED.description: An independent final evaluation explicitly found the agent-retrieval aim not fulfilled.
E-AGENT-AIM-FAILED.negative_finding: Independent evaluation found that the agent-retrieval aim was not fulfilled.

E-AGENT-AIM-FULFILLED.description: An independent final evaluation explicitly found the agent-retrieval aim fulfilled.
E-AGENT-AIM-FULFILLED.negative_finding: No independent final finding establishes that matched agent effectiveness and efficiency fulfilled the aim.

E-AGENT-EVALUATION.description: The release status records a completed machine evaluation.
E-AGENT-EVALUATION.negative_finding: The complete release question suite has not produced a completed machine evaluation.

E-BUNDLE-DESCRIPTOR.negative_finding: The generated Explorer descriptor is absent.

E-CHECKSUMS-RELEASE.description: The release status records passing bundle checksums.
E-CHECKSUMS-RELEASE.negative_finding: Full release checksum validation has not passed.

E-CITATIONS-RELEASE.description: The release status records passing citation verification.
E-CITATIONS-RELEASE.negative_finding: The release-bound citation gate has not passed.

E-CLEAN-ROOM-FIXTURE.description: The fixture reproduces byte-for-byte in the isolated reproduction harness.
E-CLEAN-ROOM-FIXTURE.negative_finding: Even the representative fixture has not reproduced exactly.

E-CLEAN-ROOM-RELEASE.description: The release status records a passing full-snapshot clean-room reproduction.
E-CLEAN-ROOM-RELEASE.negative_finding: Only fixture reproduction, not full-snapshot clean-room reproduction, has passed.

E-EVALUATION-HARNESS.description: The matched deterministic evaluation harness exists.
E-EVALUATION-HARNESS.negative_finding: The matched evaluation harness is absent.

E-EXPLORER-FOUNDATION.negative_finding: The static Explorer implementation is absent.

E-EXPLORER-NONBROWSER-TESTS.description: The recorded deterministic Explorer fixture checks have no failure.
E-EXPLORER-NONBROWSER-TESTS.negative_finding: The recorded deterministic Explorer fixture checks contain failures or no result.

E-FULL-CORPUS.description: The release status records full-corpus reconciliation.
E-FULL-CORPUS.negative_finding: The frozen T0/T1 source union has not been reconciled as a full corpus.

E-HUMAN-AIM-FAILED.description: Completed participant evidence explicitly found the preferred-human-UI aim not fulfilled.
E-HUMAN-AIM-FAILED.negative_finding: Participant evidence found that Explorer was not a UI of choice for the preregistered populations and tasks.

E-HUMAN-AIM-FULFILLED.description: Completed participant evidence explicitly found the preferred-human-UI aim fulfilled.
E-HUMAN-AIM-FULFILLED.negative_finding: No completed participant evidence establishes the preferred-human-UI outcome.

E-HUMAN-AIM-PARTLY.description: Completed participant evidence explicitly found the preferred-human-UI aim partly fulfilled.
E-HUMAN-AIM-PARTLY.negative_finding: No completed participant evidence establishes even partial preferred-UI fulfilment.

E-HUMAN-COMPLETE.description: The release status records a completed authorised participant study.
E-HUMAN-COMPLETE.negative_finding: No authorised participant study has completed; synthetic or agent evidence cannot substitute.

E-HUMAN-NOT-AVAILABLE.description: Human evaluation remains unavailable or incomplete.
E-HUMAN-NOT-AVAILABLE.negative_finding: The participant-evidence gate is not complete.

E-INDEPENDENT-WIKI.description: The bundle identifies itself as independently derived and non-authoritative.
E-INDEPENDENT-WIKI.negative_finding: The descriptor does not carry the required derived/non-authoritative declaration.

E-MACHINE-RESULTS.description: A completed immutable release evaluation result exists.
E-MACHINE-RESULTS.negative_finding: The checked-in evaluation result remains a development checkpoint rather than a complete release run.

E-PAIRED-COMPARISONS.description: The matched paired comparison artefact exists.
E-PAIRED-COMPARISONS.negative_finding: No release-bound paired comparison artefact is present.

E-PERSONA-FOUNDATION.negative_finding: The persona evidence foundation is absent.

E-PORTABILITY-AIM-FAILED.description: Independent portability evidence explicitly found the reusable-layer aim not fulfilled.
E-PORTABILITY-AIM-FAILED.negative_finding: Independent consumers found the semantic/provenance layer was not portable.

E-PORTABILITY-AIM-FULFILLED.description: Independent portability evidence explicitly found the reusable-layer aim fulfilled.
E-PORTABILITY-AIM-FULFILLED.negative_finding: No independent-consumer portability result establishes full reuse beyond Explorer.

E-PROFILE.description: The source-native GOV.UK OKF semantic profile exists.
E-PROFILE.negative_finding: The source-native semantic profile is absent.

E-QUESTIONS-RELEASE.description: The release status records an independently verified release-v2 question contract.
E-QUESTIONS-RELEASE.negative_finding: The independently verified release-v2 question contract has not passed.

E-RECONCILIATION-ARTEFACT.description: The release manifest references an existing closing reconciliation artefact.
E-RECONCILIATION-ARTEFACT.negative_finding: The release manifest has no existing closing reconciliation artefact.

E-REQUIREMENT-COVERAGE.description: The generated requirement status covers all 95 requirements.
E-REQUIREMENT-COVERAGE.negative_finding: The implementation status does not cover all 95 requirements.

E-RIGHTS-RELEASE.description: The final snapshot-bound rights and privacy audit passed.
E-RIGHTS-RELEASE.negative_finding: The rights/privacy audit is a sampled checkpoint and has not passed for the final snapshot.

E-SEMANTIC-FIXTURE.description: The representative fixture passes the semantic validator.
E-SEMANTIC-FIXTURE.negative_finding: The representative fixture does not pass semantic validation.

E-SEMANTIC-RELEASE.description: The release status records passing full-snapshot semantic validation.
E-SEMANTIC-RELEASE.negative_finding: Semantic validation has passed only for the fixture, not the final full snapshot.

E-SNAPSHOT-FULL.description: The release manifest identifies a full-corpus snapshot.
E-SNAPSHOT-FULL.negative_finding: The active release artefacts are bound to a fixture rather than a full-corpus snapshot.

E-SNAPSHOT-UNSAMPLED.description: The release manifest identifies an unsampled snapshot.
E-SNAPSHOT-UNSAMPLED.negative_finding: The active release snapshot is sampled.

E-SOURCE-PREFLIGHT.description: The dated official-source preflight has zero official-source failures.
E-SOURCE-PREFLIGHT.negative_finding: The dated official-source preflight contains a failed official source.

E-STATIC-SEARCH.description: The generated static search manifest exists.
E-STATIC-SEARCH.negative_finding: The static search manifest is absent.

E-TRACEABILITY-COVERAGE.description: The generated traceability status covers all 21 controlling clauses.
E-TRACEABILITY-COVERAGE.negative_finding: The generated traceability status does not cover every controlling clause.

E-ZERO-OMISSIONS.description: The release status records zero unexplained omissions.
E-ZERO-OMISSIONS.negative_finding: Zero unexplained omissions has not been established for the full source union.

aims.title: Independent OKF Bundle Wiki mapping GOV.UK
aims.interpretation: Publish a derived, non-authoritative, independently loadable federated bundle that maps the declared GOV.UK metadata boundary.
aims.boundary: A fixture demonstrates the pipeline but cannot fulfil an independent full release.
aims.standing_negative_finding: The bundle is independently published but remains derived and non-authoritative; GOV.UK is the authoritative destination.

next_actions.action: Build and bind the publication artefacts to the closing unsampled full-corpus snapshot.
Reproduce the full release from pinned frozen inputs before publication.

aims.title: Whole bounded public GOV.UK metadata coverage
aims.interpretation: Close the declared T0/T1 union with one disposition per candidate and zero unexplained omissions; this is not a claim about every *.gov.uk site or complete page bodies.
aims.boundary: A source audit or sampled capacity run is supporting evidence only, not corpus closure.
aims.standing_negative_finding: Completeness is bounded to the declared public-source union and cannot prove that an unknown, non-enumerated item does not exist.

next_actions.action: Complete T0 hydration, T1 closure and per-class reconciliation.
Run and resolve the rights/privacy review against the final unsampled snapshot.

aims.title: Help people navigate and understand GOV.UK
aims.interpretation: Provide an accessible discovery surface and establish human task benefit with genuine evidence, while retaining GOV.UK as the authoritative destination.
aims.boundary: Fixture UI and automated checks support only partial fulfilment without completed participant evidence.
aims.standing_negative_finding: Metadata discovery cannot replace reading authoritative guidance or completing a government transaction.

next_actions.action: After authority and ethics approval, run the preregistered accessible participant study.
Retain task failures and report a partial or negative human outcome if that is what the evidence shows.

aims.title: Become a Human UI of choice for defined populations and tasks
aims.interpretation: Make a preference/effectiveness conclusion only for preregistered populations and tasks after genuine accessible participant research.
aims.boundary: Synthetic, automated, expert-only or agent evidence cannot satisfy this aim.
aims.standing_negative_finding: Any preferred-UI result is population- and task-specific, not a universal preference claim.

next_actions.action: Obtain human-study authority and complete the preregistered participant comparison.

aims.title: Help systems understand GOV.UK identities, hierarchy, lifecycle and relationships
aims.interpretation: Expose source-native entity distinctions and evidence-bearing typed relationships through validated machine-readable artefacts.
aims.boundary: Passing fixture semantics demonstrates the model, not complete full-corpus system coverage.
aims.standing_negative_finding: Public metadata cannot expose source-native edition or internal publishing detail that GOV.UK does not publish.

next_actions.action: Run JSON Schema, SHACL, RDFC equivalence and referential checks across every final release shard.

aims.title: Help agents retrieve and cite authoritative GOV.UK content
aims.interpretation: Demonstrate metadata discovery, typed traversal, authoritative hand-off, citation correctness and abstention under matched frozen conditions.
aims.boundary: This is not a claim that the metadata layer itself answers substantive body-content questions.
aims.standing_negative_finding: The layer supports discovery and evidence hand-off; substantive answers still require retrieval from authoritative GOV.UK content.

next_actions.action: Run every frozen release-v2 question against every matched machine system.
Issue an independent H-03 disposition from the paired effectiveness, efficiency and failure evidence; retain an unfavourable result.

aims.title: Compare source metadata, public presentation and search or discovery behaviour
aims.interpretation: Publish reproducible comparator evidence and matched behaviour comparisons without fabricating unavailable external-system results.
aims.boundary: Architecture and source comparison without complete matched runs is partial fulfilment.
aims.standing_negative_finding: Internal or unavailable comparators cannot be represented as matched empirical results without authorised reproducible access.

next_actions.action: Publish the frozen paired comparisons and preserve explicit exclusions for unavailable external systems.

aims.title: Establish a reusable semantic and provenance layer
aims.interpretation: Provide portable source-native semantics, equivalent YAML-LD and JSON-LD, assertion provenance and stable static distribution for later consumers.
aims.boundary: Internal validation proves conformance; full reuse requires independent-consumer evidence.
aims.standing_negative_finding: Profile extensions exceed the minimal OKF base and require consumers to support the declared versioned profile.

next_actions.action: Validate the released profile with an independent consumer that does not depend on Explorer-specific code.

aims.title: Transparent, unattended and reproducible execution
aims.interpretation: Make deterministic work, evidence, exceptions, usage, checks and final dispositions inspectable and reproducible from pinned inputs.
aims.boundary: A reproducible fixture and implemented controller are partial until the final full release reproduces and every requirement is dispositioned.
aims.standing_negative_finding: A frozen release can reproduce its artefacts but cannot make a changing live GOV.UK snapshot permanently current.

next_actions.action: Run the full-snapshot clean-room replay and bind the result to release checksums and the SBOM.
